edges.name: unfurl
edges.desc: Phi -> eta*: coherence decomposes into gap

edges.name: quantize
edges.desc: eta* -> r: gap quantized into correlation

edges.name: invert
edges.desc: r -> lambda_dom: correlation inverts to suppression

edges.name: reflect
edges.desc: lambda_dom -> Phi: suppression reflects to coherence

edges.name: accelerate
edges.desc: lambda_I80 -> r_I80: intervention accelerates to correlation

edges.name: close
edges.desc: r_I80 -> Phi: correlation closes to coherence

edges.name: judge
edges.desc: Phi -> lambda_I80: coherence judged by intervention eigenvalue

edges.name: inject
edges.desc: eta* -> r_I80: gap injected into correlation

edges.name: weigh
edges.desc: r -> lambda_I80: correlation weighed against intervention

edges.name: deploy
edges.desc: lambda_dom -> r_I80: suppression deployed as correlation

edges.name: scan
edges.desc: Phi -> r: coherence scanned into correlation

edges.name: cross
edges.desc: lambda_dom -> lambda_I80: suppression crossed to intervention
